underlying_goal: Polish, deploy, and improve a deep learning tutorial website (dl-course) built alongside the tensorflowccp C++ framework, ensuring lessons accurately reflect the actual codebase
friction_detail: Three parallel subagents were blocked by IDE auto-deny on Read/Bash tools, requiring Claude to redo the work directly.
brief_summary: User wanted to deploy and iteratively improve a DL tutorial site to better match the underlying C++ codebase; Claude fixed conceptual errors, added accurate code excerpts across multiple lessons, and pushed deployments successfully.
